hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); case "$FILE" in */CLAUDE.md) echo 'BLOCKED: CLAUDE.md 是只读文件' >&2; exit 2;; */experiment_sop.md) echo 'BLOCKED: experiment_sop.md 是只读文件' >&2; exit 2;; */.claude/agents/*.md) echo 'BLOCKED: agents/*.md 是只读文件' >&2; exit 2;; *) exit 0;; esac

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 || { echo "BLOCKED: $FILE 语法错误" >&2; exit 2; }; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/src/.*\.py$|/scripts/(eval_|calibrate_|profile_|run_|aggregate_).*\.py$' && echo "§5.1 审查提醒: $FILE 已修改，commit 前须通过 Codex + Sub-Agent 双重审查"; exit 0
DIRTY=$(git status --porcelain -- src/ scripts/ tests/ 2>/dev/null | head -10); [ -n "$DIRTY" ] && printf '⚠ Session 结束时有未提交的代码修改:\n%s\n' "$DIRTY"; exit 0
